data.title: Franco-Nevada Files Year-End Disclosure Documents
data.description: On March 19, 2026, Franco-Nevada Corporation revealed the submission of its Annual Information Form, Consolidated Annual Financial Statements, and Management's Discussion and Analysis for the fiscal year concluding on December 31, 2025. This documentation has been officially lodged with Canadian securities regulators.

data.title: Origin Agency Names Mary Jo Behrman Managing Partner, Announces Strategic Investment from Demeter Partners
data.description: A retail marketing agency headquartered in St. Louis is enhancing its leadership team and services to cater to brand developers during critical growth phases. Origin Agency, based in St. Louis, announced the expansion on March 19, 2026. With almost two decades of expertise in establishing consumer packaged goods (CPG) brands at a crucial stage, the agency is aiming to enhance its capabilities and provide support to brand owners.

data.title: Why Traders Expecting Profits From A Short-Term Spike In Gasoline Prices Could Be Disappointed
data.description: As the conflict persists, energy and gas prices are projected to stay elevated, dashing early expectations of a brief surge. This has led to disappointment among traders who anticipated making profits from a temporary increase in gasoline prices.

data.title: KBRA Assigns Preliminary Ratings to GS Mortgage-Backed Securities Trust 2026-HE1 (GSMBS 2026-HE1)
data.description: In New York, KBRA has assigned initial ratings to 6 classes of mortgage-backed notes from GS Mortgage-Backed Securities Trust 2026-HE1 (GSMBS 2026-HE1), a residential mortgage-backed securities (RMBS) offering totaling $301.4 million. The sponsor is Goldman Sachs Mortgage Company (Goldman Sachs or GSMC). This transaction involves a mix of first lien (6.6%) and second lien (93.4%) home equity line of credit (HELOC) loans. The underlying pool includes 3,092 loans, with a seasoning of about six months. United Wholesale Mortgage, LLC (UWM) accounts for 79.5% of the loans in the pool.

data.title: After an 89% price drop, Solana Treasury firm Forward Industries spent $27.4M to repurchase over 6M shares to enhance shareholder value.
data.description: Forward Industries, a company in the Solana treasury sector, recently repurchased over 6 million shares at a total cost of $27.4 million. This move was made in order to enhance shareholder value within the firm.

data.title: BALAVANT INTRODUCES SENTRIC SPECIALTY, ADVANCING ITS VISION FOR NEXT-GENERATION PROGRAM MANAGERS
data.description: Leading with a focus on entrepreneurial risk assessment and strategic financial backing, Balavant Insurance Group unveiled the establishment of Sentric Specialty in Novato, California. Launched on March 19, 2026, Sentric Specialty is a program manager designed to bolster a specialized franchise model. This initiative aims to leverage underwriting expertise and capital resources to scale operations effectively.

data.title: PSB Holdings, Inc. Announces Quarterly Cash Dividend of $0.18 Per Share
data.description: On March 17, 2026, PSB Holdings, Inc., the parent company of Peoples State Bank, announced a regular quarterly cash dividend of $0.18 per share of the Company’s common stock. This dividend marks a 6% increase from the previous semi-annual dividends paid in 2025. The dividend will be payable on April 30, 2026, to shareholders of record as of April 10, 2026. PSB Holdings has upheld a 61-year tradition of cash dividends to shareholders, with 33 consecutive years of increased cash dividends declared per share.

data.title: DHT Holdings, Inc. has filed Form 20-F for 2025 with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission
data.description: DHT Holdings, Inc. recently submitted its annual report for the year 2025 to the SEC. This Bermuda-based company, listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol DHT, disclosed its financial performance and other pertinent information in the Form 20-F filing. The report, submitted on March 19, 2026, provides a comprehensive overview of the Company's activities and results for the year. This regulatory filing offers investors and stakeholders valuable insights into DHT Holdings, Inc.'s operations and growth during the specified period.

data.title: FedEx Tops Q3 Estimates, Freight Spin-Off Remains On Track
data.description: FedEx Corp (NYSE: FDX) released its third-quarter fiscal 2026 financial results, surpassing expectations. The company reported quarterly revenue of $24 billion, which exceeded analyst forecasts of $23.42 billion. Additionally, FedEx posted adjusted earnings of $5.25 per share for the third quarter, outperforming estimates of $4.13 per share. The Federal Express segment of the company experienced enhanced operating results in the quarter, attributed to higher U.S. domestic and International Priority package yields, ongoing cost savings from transformation efforts, and increased U.S. market presence. FedEx stock is displaying positive momentum following the announcement. For more details, the full story is accessible on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Flowco Holdings Inc. Announces Launch of Public Offering by Selling Stockholders
data.description: Houston-based Flowco Holdings Inc. (NYSE: FLOC) has revealed the initiation of an underwritten public offering by GEC Advisors LLC affiliates. The offering entails 7,800,000 shares of Flowco's Class A common stock. Additionally, the Selling Stockholders have given underwriters a 30-day option to acquire an extra 1,170,000 shares at the public offering price, after deducting underwriting discounts and commissions.

data.title: MessagePay and Glia Embed Secure Payments Directly Into AI-Powered Banking Conversations
data.description: A recent integration now allows credit unions and community banks to instantly process payments through various channels such as digital, SMS, and voice. This development, which took place in LEHI, Utah on March 19, 2026, comes as these financial institutions increasingly embrace AI-powered service options. The integration aims to enhance payment processing efficiency and streamline transactions for the institutions.

data.title: LEMAY - AMERICA'S CAR MUSEUM INTRODUCES WORLD'S FIRST NEXT-GENERATION RACING SIMULATORS
data.description: LeMay – America's Car Museum is now home to the world's inaugural installation of the cutting-edge CXC MP3 Motion Pro III racing simulators. These simulators are equipped with the advanced Assetto Corsa professional racing simulation software, delivering unparalleled realism in racing dynamics. Visitors to the museum can experience these state-of-the-art simulators firsthand. Additionally, the simulators are available for private event rentals. This installation marks a milestone for the museum, offering an unmatched experience to automotive enthusiasts.

data.title: Stock Market Today: Russell 2000 Leads As Market Claws Back Earlier Losses; Bank, Energy Stocks Up (Live Coverage)
data.description: On Thursday, the Dow Jones index experienced a decline due to a surge in oil prices. Despite posting strong earnings, Micron stock witnessed a significant drop. The stock market today saw the Russell 2000 leading the way as the market recovered from earlier losses, with bank and energy stocks showing increases. Live coverage of these market developments was provided, with a focus on the recovery and upward movement in stocks after the initial downturn. The fluctuations in stock prices and indices, along with the impact of rising oil prices, were notable aspects of the day's trading activities.

data.title: Vanda Pharmaceuticals Calls for Stronger FDA Action to Accelerate Shift from Animal Testing to Human-Relevant Methods
data.description: On March 19, 2026, Vanda Pharmaceuticals Inc. (Nasdaq: VNDA) expressed concerns regarding the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) draft. Vanda, known for innovative drug development and opposing unnecessary animal testing, highlights the FDA's new proposal.

data.title: In HelloNation, Dentistry Expert Allen Blourchian Explains Dental Implant Candidacy
data.description: In Franklin, Tennessee, a recent publication by HelloNation on March 19, 2026, explores the key factors determining a person's suitability for dental implants. The article delves into the criteria that make an individual a strong candidate for dental implants, shedding light on various influences that come into play. By offering a detailed analysis, HelloNation outlines the necessary considerations for assessing eligibility for dental implant procedures.

data.title: Healthpeak Properties and Janus Living Announce Pricing of Upsized $840 Million Janus Living Initial Public Offering
data.description: Denver - Healthpeak Properties, Inc. (NYSE: DOC) and Janus Living, Inc. disclosed the successful pricing of Janus Living's increased initial public offering (IPO) of 42,000,000 shares of Janus Living Class A-1 common stock at $20.00 per share. Moreover, Janus Living has provided the underwriters with a 30-day option to buy up to 6,300,000 additional shares of its Class A-1 common stock at the IPO price, excluding.

data.title: Equity Residential Declares First Quarter Dividends
data.description: Equity Residential (NYSE: EQR) based in Chicago, declared its quarterly dividends for common and preferred shares. For the first quarter of 2026, a regular common share dividend of $0.7025 per share was announced, payable on April 10, 2026, to shareholders listed on record by March 30, 2026. This marks a 1.4% increase from the 2025 common share dividend, now at an annualized $2.81 per share. Additionally, a quarterly dividend of $1.03625 per share will be paid on March.
